name: warning-volatility-heavy
description: Prompt saturated with 5 volatility phrases (bucket capped at 100) plus 2 ambiguous terms. Tests that volatility + ambiguity + structural can reach warning.

input.prompt: Write a detailed comprehensive summary. Thoroughly explain every aspect in depth, as much as possible. Please optimize the output to be better quality.

notes: Volatility phrases: write a detailed(+25)+comprehensive(+25)+thoroughly explain(+25)+in depth(+25)+as much as possible(+25)=125+256>60(+30)=155→capped=100. Ambiguity: optimize+better=2 matches/23 words=0.087→bucket=90. Structural=100. Score=55.
